questionHtml:
Two forces of magnitude 12 N and 24 N act at the same point. Which force cannot be the resultant of these forces?

A. 10 N

B. 16 N

C. 19 N

D. 36 N

meta.title: Two forces of magnitude 12 N and 24 N act at the same point. Which force cannot be the resultant of these forces? A. 10 N B. 16 N C. 19 N D. 36 N
